complexity.justification: Table-driven random-access lookup with PERFORM VARYING iteration and error handling

annotation_metadata.note: source_lines and cobol_snippet fields checked against the uploaded VSCBEX03.cbl

rules.name: BR_001
rules.confidence_justification: Direct MOVE of a hard-coded literal group into the lookup table structure
rules.natural_language_rule: The program loads a fixed set of 5 customer IDs (0010, 0420, 0878, 0210, 0998), hard-coded at compile time, into the working key table used to drive random lookups.
rules.precondition: WS-Key-HOLD contains its compile-time VALUE clauses
rules.postcondition: WS-Key-Table (OCCURS 5) is populated with the 5 lookup keys

rules.name: BR_002
rules.natural_language_rule: The indexed customer file is opened for random-access input so individual records can be retrieved by key.
rules.precondition: CUSTFile is defined with ACCESS MODE IS RANDOM and not yet opened
rules.postcondition: CUSTFile is open and available for keyed READ

rules.name: BR_003
rules.confidence_justification: PERFORM VARYING...UNTIL is explicit indexed-loop control
rules.cobol_snippet:
PERFORM VARYING WS-Key-SUB FROM 1 BY 1
   UNTIL WS-Key-SUB > WS-Key-Element-Cnt
   MOVE WS-Key-Value(WS-Key-SUB) TO
      CUSTFile-Cust-ID
   PERFORM 5000-Read-CUSTFile
   DISPLAY "CUSTFile Record: " CUSTFile-Customer-Record
END-PERFORM.
rules.natural_language_rule: For each of the 5 hard-coded customer IDs in order, the program sets the record key, performs a random read for that specific customer, and displays whatever record is returned.
rules.precondition: WS-Key-Table-Setup is populated (BR_001) and CUSTFile is open (BR_002)
rules.action: Loop WS-Key-SUB from 1 to WS-Key-Element-Cnt (5); for each, move the table key to CUSTFile-Cust-ID, perform the random read, display the record
rules.postcondition: All 5 keyed lookups have been attempted and their results displayed

rules.name: BR_004
rules.confidence_justification: READ...RECORD KEY IS is explicit random-access read syntax
rules.cobol_snippet:
5000-Read-CUSTFile.
    READ CUSTFile
       RECORD KEY IS CUSTFile-Cust-ID
    END-READ.
rules.natural_language_rule: The customer record matching the current key value is retrieved directly from the indexed file using random access.
rules.precondition: CUSTFile-Cust-ID has been set to the desired key (BR_003); CUSTFile is OPEN INPUT with ACCESS MODE RANDOM
rules.postcondition: CUSTFile-Customer-Record contains the matched record, or the read status reflects not-found/error

rules.name: TR_005
rules.confidence_justification: Direct ADD statement; unambiguous counter increment
rules.natural_language_rule: The system increments the successful-read counter by 1 each time a keyed lookup returns a record.
rules.postcondition: FD-CUSTFile-Record-Cnt reflects the number of successful lookups so far

rules.name: TR_006
rules.confidence_justification: Direct DISPLAY statements for the run summary
rules.cobol_snippet:
3000-End-Job.
    DISPLAY EOJ-End-Message.
    DISPLAY "   Records Read: " FD-CUSTFile-Record-Cnt
rules.natural_language_rule: At end of processing, the program displays an end-of-job banner and the total count of successful keyed lookups.
rules.action: DISPLAY end-of-job banner and lookup count
rules.postcondition: Summary information is visible to the operator

rules.name: TR_007
rules.natural_language_rule: The indexed customer file is closed before program termination to release the file handle.

rules.name: ER_008
rules.confidence_justification: READ status check is explicit, but the paragraph combines a not-found/EOF branch with a hard-error abend path
rules.cobol_snippet:
IF WS-CUSTFile-Good
   ADD +1 TO FD-CUSTFile-Record-Cnt
ELSE
   IF WS-CUSTFile-EOF
      NEXT SENTENCE
   ELSE
      DISPLAY "** ERROR **: 5000-Read-CUSTFile" ...
      PERFORM 3000-End-Job
      MOVE 8 TO RETURN-CODE
      GOBACK
   END-IF
END-IF.
rules.natural_language_rule: If a keyed read does not succeed, the program treats a not-found/EOF condition as a silent skip (NEXT SENTENCE), but any other read failure triggers diagnostic display, end-of-job cleanup, and immediate termination with RETURN-CODE 8.
rules.precondition: A keyed READ against CUSTFile (BR_004) has just been attempted
rules.action: Branch on read status; not-found/EOF is skipped silently, any other error aborts the run
rules.postcondition: Either processing continues to the next key, or the program has terminated abnormally
